title: HSK2 Gate 18 Lesson
explanation: This is a capstone-style gate. Read the whole paragraph before answering.
passage: 第18关（挑战）：老师问：“你为什么想学中文？”我说：“因为中文很有用，而且我想和家人说话。”我的朋友也说，学习要坚持。我们每天练习一点点，就会进步。

comprehension.question: Why does the speaker want to learn Chinese?
comprehension.answer: Because it is useful and they want to talk with family.

comprehension.question: What does the friend say about learning?
comprehension.answer: You need to keep at it / persist.

comprehension.question: What strategy does the paragraph suggest?
comprehension.answer: Practice a little every day to improve.

speakingPrompt: Answer the teacher question in Chinese in 2–3 sentences, then ask a parent to listen.
